# NVIDIA Sources

## CUPTI

- CUPTI documentation index: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/index.html
- CUPTI usage guide: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/main/main.html
- CUPTI API modules: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/api/modules.html
- CUPTI release notes: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/release-notes/release-notes.html
- CUPTI Range Profiling API: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/api/group__CUPTI__RANGE__PROFILER__API.html
- CUPTI Profiler Host API: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/api/group__CUPTI__PROFILER__HOST__API.html
- CUPTI PM Sampling API: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/api/group__CUPTI__PM__SAMPLING__API.html
- CUPTI PC Sampling API: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/api/group__CUPTI__PCSAMPLING__API.html
- CUPTI PC Sampling Utility API: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/api/group__CUPTI__PCSAMPLING__UTILITY.html
- CUPTI SASS Metrics API: https://docs.nvidia.com/cupti/api/group__CUPTI__SASS__METRICS__API.html

## NVBit

- Official NVBit repository: https://github.com/NVlabs/NVBit
- NVBit releases: https://github.com/NVlabs/NVBit/releases
- NVBit MICRO 2019 paper page: https://research.nvidia.com/publication/2019-10_nvbit-dynamic-binary-instrumentation-framework-nvidia-gpus
- NVBit MICRO 2019 paper PDF: https://github.com/NVlabs/NVBit/releases/download/v1.0/MICRO_19_NVBit.pdf
- NVBit tutorial repository: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/nvbit-tutorial
- NVBit tutorial docs: https://eunomia.dev/others/nvbit-tutorial/

## Related NVIDIA Profiling Context

- Nsight Compute Profiling Guide: https://docs.nvidia.com/nsight-compute/ProfilingGuide/index.html
- Nsight Compute CLI: https://docs.nvidia.com/nsight-compute/NsightComputeCli/index.html
- Nsight Compute Customization Guide: https://docs.nvidia.com/nsight-compute/CustomizationGuide/index.html
